creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-03-12 16:41:31 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc             Makefile 
  Added files:
    textproc/pecl-wbxml  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    textproc/pecl-wbxml/files patch-config.m4 patch-wbxml.c 
  Log:
  This extension provides WBXML (Wireless Binary XML) conversion capabilities
  using the libwbxml library, which can be found at https://libwbxml.opensync.org/
  
  WWW:    http://pecl.php.net/package/WBXML/
  
  PR:             ports/132552
  Submitted by:   Florian Smeets <flo at kasimir.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1311    +1 -0      ports/textproc/Makefile
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/textproc/pecl-wbxml/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/textproc/pecl-wbxml/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/textproc/pecl-wbxml/files/patch-config.m4 (new)
  1.1       +13 -0     ports/textproc/pecl-wbxml/files/patch-wbxml.c (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/textproc/pecl-wbxml/pkg-descr (new)
